title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition
description: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Learners cumulatively produce a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
Choose milestones that leave a verified, restartable artifact.
Update the plan when evidence changes while preserving the goal and recorded decisions.
